rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) concerns property tax appraised value and has no relation to Educ. Code §33.0833, which governs UIL activity eligibility for students receiving outpatient mental health services.
quote: The University Interscholastic League shall ensure that league rules do not exclude from eligibility for participation in a league activity a student to whom this section applies based solely on the criteria described in Subsection (a)(1).
_note: No overlap between proposed property tax change and this education eligibility statute.
